# AI Context for @json-express/adapter-json

This is the default file-system persistence adapter for JSONExpress. It provides atomic writes to `.json` files.

## Setup
```typescript
import { AdapterJson } from '@json-express/adapter-json';
kernel.registerAdapter(new AdapterJson({ dir: './data' }));
```

## AI Instruction
- Do not attempt to use transactions. `adapter-json` uses debounced atomic file replacement, so transactions do not exist.
- When generating seed data, write directly to the `data/*.json` files.
